channel.title: healthTest
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from healthTest, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sycophantic AI flatters and suggests you are not to blame
item.description: The AI models and chatbots that we interact with tend to affirm our feelings and viewpoints â more so than people do, with potentially worrisome conse...

item.description: After a year without data, the State Department released figures on PEPFAR, the program launched by George W. Bush and credited with saving millions o...

item.title: TikTok âFibermaxxingâ trend targets gut microbiome health
item.description: 1. The viral âFibermaxxingâ trend prioritizes high-volume whole-food fiber intake to optimize gut microbiome diversity and improve metabolic satiety. ...

item.title: Increased childhood intake of ultra-processed foods is associated with a higher body mass index in young adulthood
item.description: 1. Greater childhood intake of ultra-processed foods was associated with higher body mass index in young adulthood. 2. The association was most eviden...

item.title: Small-bites fascial closure reduces long-term risk of incisional hernia after midline laparotomy
item.description: 1. The small-bites fascial closure technique reduced the long-term incidence of incisional hernias compared to the traditional large-bites technique a...

item.title: High levels of gut bacterial toxin trigger lupus nephritis
item.description: The body's immune reaction to increased levels of a toxic molecule, part of a bacterial species in the human gut, may reveal who is most at risk of de...

item.title: FXIa Inhibitor Hits Mark in Recurrent Stroke Prevention
item.description: Full results from the OCEANIC-STROKE trial show a 26% reduction in recurrent stroke with the factor XIa inhibitor asundexian, with no increased bleedi...

item.title: Minimally invasive percutaneous arterial bypass shows strong outcome regardless of distal vessel flow
item.description: New findings from a DETOUR2 substudy show that minimally invasive percutaneous transmural arterial bypass (PTAB) may offer a promising alternative to ...

item.title: Imaging Beats Palpation for Skin Cancer Staging
item.description: Ultrasonography and CT beat physical exam for nodal metastasis detection in patients with high-risk skin cancer but show poor sensitivity in immunosup...

item.title: Laser Pretreatment Boosts Actinic Keratosis Clearance
item.description: Ablative fractional laser-assisted daylight photodynamic therapy can achieve higher sustained lesion-specific clearance than daylight photodynamic the...

item.title: Activity may be safer than thought for children with cardiomyopathy or ICDs

item.title: 'Leave-nothing-behind' strategy works as well as drug-eluting stent for heart attack and chest pain patients

item.title: Mobile Lifestyle App Keeps Weight Down in Pregnant Moms
item.description: Delivery of the program needs rethinking because only about half of patients opt to use digital weight management. Medscape Medical News

item.title: His Cancer Diagnosis in Medical School Changed Everything

item.title: Pelvic floor muscle training may reduce postpartum stress urinary incontinence

item.title: Restrictions on obesity drug coverage force patients to pivot

item.title: Gene therapy for a rare type of deafness shows lasting results
item.description: Researchers say a gene therapy allowed deaf children and adults as old as 32 to hear for the first time. The benefits have persisted for more than two...
